body_transformation: The shell now features deep sapphire blue scales with obsidian black ridges and violet twilight accents along the edges, resembling polished dragon armor. The curled tail tip transforms into a hardened, spiked appendage with crimson flame-like patterns etching its surface. The rounded head retains its shape but gains a jagged horn crest and slit-pupil eyes with metallic sheen. Short stubby legs now bear leathery wing membranes with golden amber veins extending along their length.
signature_feature: Shell ridges: obsidian black with violet twilight accents and deep sapphire blue scales.
